promoted_facts.fact: PDRI derived $5,827,294 (9.33% of $62,442,294 total revenue) from required franchisee purchases/leases in FY2024
SMP spending breakdown: 61.7% Business Dev/Field Marketing Staff, 15.8% Production, 9.7% Media, 7.3% PR, 3.7% Training, 1.5% Quality, 0.4% Admin
FS Brands, Inc. is 97.18% owned by FS Property Services (U.S.) Inc., which is indirectly 100% owned by FirstService Corporation
PDRI acquires franchises via PDO Holdings (80%+ of 22 franchises) and PDR Holdings (≤50.1% of 31 franchises) — total 53 affiliate-owned franchises operating under FAs
Paul Davis Franchise Owner's Association (FOA) — Brady Chuckel, NEC President, requested inclusion in FDD
Typical office space: 3K office + 8K industrial (11K sqft). Typical rent $5K-$15K/month
promoted_facts.source: Pass B / Item 7 Note 2, PDF page 26

promoted_facts.fact: Van requirement: 3/4-ton extended van ($50K-$91K new). Optional vehicle mount $15K-$30K
promoted_facts.source: Pass B / Item 7 Note 5, PDF pages 26-27
